title: focus()
text: focus() Gives focus to the HTML input widget of the field. Return = Field. focus() Arguments None Return value None Description This function can only be used with HTML widgets in a Dynamic Server Page. Example: Using focus() In the following example, focus() is used to give focus to the current field. Explain this code ; at Field level webtrigger OnSyntaxError scope input endscope javascript alert('Ensure that the field syntax is correct before leaving this field.'); this.focus(); return false; endjavascript end Copy Was this topic helpful?
